# Summary

Describe what changed and why.

# Checklist

- [ ] Auth, tokens, Prisma, and module wiring were reviewed if impacted.
- [ ] Lint, typecheck, tests, and build were run successfully.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or hardcoded infrastructure values were introduced.
- [ ] DTOs, guards, and Swagger metadata were updated when needed.
- [ ] Public API changes are documented and intentional.

# Notes

Add any rollout notes, security considerations, or follow-up work here.
